<!--
  Thanks for helping improve the catalog's structure!
  Category changes are discussed before implementation — a maintainer
  will review this proposal and coordinate next steps.
-->

## Type of Change

<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] Add a new section
- [ ] Rename an existing section
- [ ] Split an existing section into multiple
- [ ] Merge two or more existing sections
- [ ] Reorder sections

## Proposed Section Name

<!-- The name you'd like to see (e.g., "AI-Powered Design Tools") -->

## Proposed Location

<!-- Where should this section appear in the README? (e.g., "After the 'Video' section, before 'APIs'") -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this change needed? What gap does it fill? -->

## Example Tools

<!-- List 3–5 tools that would belong in this section, in the standard entry format -->

```markdown
- **[Tool Name](URL)**: Description.
- **[Tool Name](URL)**: Description.
- **[Tool Name](URL)**: Description.
```

## Existing Sections This Would Overlap With

<!-- Name any sections that might share tools with this proposal -->
